steps.title: Attach the means phrase
steps.content: The phrase "by being passed down" explains how the manuscripts survived to the present day. It should attach directly to the clause before it.

steps.title: Reject fragment punctuation
steps.content: A and D make the phrase beginning with "By being passed down" a fragment. C inserts a comma between the preposition "by" and its object phrase, which is ungrammatical. No punctuation is needed before "by being passed down." The answer is B.
